Christopher Robin (2018)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $99,215,042Details
International Box Office $98,529,335
Worldwide Box Office $197,744,377
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $10,632,592
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $14,222,931
Total $24,855,523
Further financial details...

Synopsis

The young boy who loved embarking on adventures in the Hundred Acre Wood with a band of spirited and loveable stuffed animals, has grown up and lost his way. Now it is up to his childhood friends to venture into our world and help Christopher Robin remember the loving and playful boy who is still inside.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$24,585,139 (24.8% of total gross)
Legs:4.04 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:50.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$75,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,602 opening theaters/3,602 max. theaters, 7.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $130,253,777

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: August 3rd, 2018 (Wide) by Walt Disney
International Releases: August 3rd, 2018 (Wide) (Russia (CIS))

August 3rd, 2018 (Wide) (Singapore)
Video Release: November 6th, 2018 by Walt Disney Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for some action.

Running Time: 104 minutes

Synopsis

The young boy who loved embarking on adventures in the Hundred Acre Wood with a band of spirited and loveable stuffed animals, has grown up and lost his way. Now it is up to his childhood friends to venture into our world and help Christopher Robin remember the loving and playful boy who is still inside.
